about: Suggest a new capability or improvement

labels: enhancement
assignees: ''

## What problem does this solve?

<!-- Describe the underlying need. What can't you do today, or what
     is harder than it should be? -->

## Proposed solution

<!-- Describe what you'd like to see happen. Be as concrete as you can. -->

## Alternatives considered

<!-- Other approaches you thought about, and why you think the proposed
     one is better. -->

## Impact on existing behavior

<!-- Would this change how Genesis behaves today? Are there risks to
     backward compatibility, stability, or safety? -->

## Additional context

<!-- Related issues, external references, mockups, architectural notes. -->
